item.title: Activity digest and approval queue
steps: Implement activity log collector: gather actions, errors, egress, approvals from the last period
Implement digest generator: local LLM summarizes activity into human-readable daily summary
Implement privacy mode: summarize by category without showing content
Implement approval queue: actions in requires-approval categories are queued
Implement approval resolution: approve, reject (with reason as preference signal), expire after timeout
Integrate approval queue with messaging channel (Telegram)
acceptanceCriteria: Digest includes: tasks completed, tasks queued, problems found with proposed solutions, egress summary
Privacy mode summarizes by category without exposing content
Approval queue works for high-stakes actions (send email, create event, etc.)
Rejected approvals store reason as preference signal
